description: B2B arm of Livi/Kry offering occupational health services to UK employers. Provides video consultations, health assessments, absence management support, and wellness programs.
business_model: B2B - Corporate contracts for employee health services
key_investors: Index Ventures, Creandum, Accel, General Atlantic
competitive_advantage: Digital-first approach, GP network, brand recognition, scalable model

varden_fit.rationale: Direct competitor in UK occupational health market - well-funded and established
